title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: redhat-release bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for redhat-release is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The redhat-release package contains licensing information regarding, and identifies the installed version of, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL10][redhat-release] CPE_NAME use full release version (JIRA:RHELBLD-16693)  [RHEL10][redhat-release] Re-disable rpcbind.service and rpcbind.socket (JIRA:RHELBLD-17240)  [RHEL10][redhat-release] Enable greenboot services (JIRA:RHELBLD-17329)

full_text:
An update for redhat-release is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The redhat-release package contains licensing information regarding, and identifies the installed version of, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL10][redhat-release] CPE_NAME use full release version (JIRA:RHELBLD-16693)  [RHEL10][redhat-release] Re-disable rpcbind.service and rpcbind.socket (JIRA:RHELBLD-17240)  [RHEL10][redhat-release] Enable greenboot services (JIRA:RHELBLD-17329)
